reviewed_actions.ai_reasoning: Google is a direct AI infrastructure and platform play — they operate one of the three major hyperscale clouds (GCP), have their own custom TPU silicon, Gemini foundation models, and DeepMind. 18% revenue growth, 59.7% gross margins, P/E of 25.3 is cheap for this quality. The quant score of 47 understates the AI thesis alignment. Volume factor at 63 shows institutional accumulation. This is the highest-conviction AI satellite available on the watchlist — direct exposure to the same AI wave VCX captures on the private side. At ~$26K this keeps us within cash constraints while maintaining VCX as the dominant anchor.

Microsoft is the other premier AI infrastructure satellite — largest investor in OpenAI (which is VCX's top holding), Azure AI is scaling rapidly, Copilot monetization across the Office suite, 16.7% revenue growth, 68.6% gross margins, P/E of 22.3 is historically cheap for MSFT. Direct thematic overlap with VCX's OpenAI exposure. Sold today on intelligence signal but the fundamental AI thesis is unchanged — this is a re-entry at roughly the same level. ~$23.9K position keeps total deployment within cash limits.
